summary: Testing completed for AI Context-Aware, AI Actions, and File Manager features. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests all successful - Documents page and AI Assistant page working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

seed_data_creation: Created test task and quote via AI actions (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Context-Aware and Actions features fully working. File Manager module fully functional with folder creation, file upload, and stats. Route for AI Assistant is /admin/assistant (not /admin/ai-assistant).

ai_context_aware.details: GET /api/ai-enhanced/context returns CRM data summary including factures, contacts, tâches, pipeline, devis. Context-Aware badge visible in UI.

ai_actions_create_task.details: POST /api/ai-enhanced/execute-action with action_type='create_task' successfully creates tasks. Task verified in database.

ai_actions_create_quote.details: POST /api/ai-enhanced/execute-action with action_type='create_quote' successfully creates quotes with calculated totals.

file_manager_stats.details: GET /api/file-manager/stats returns total_documents, total_folders, total_size, total_size_formatted

file_manager_folders.details: POST /api/file-manager/folders creates folders. GET /api/file-manager/folders lists folders. GET /api/file-manager/folders/tree returns tree structure.

file_manager_upload.details: POST /api/file-manager/upload successfully uploads files with metadata (name, url, file_type, size_formatted)

documents_page_ui.details: Documents page loads correctly with stats display, 'Nouveau dossier' and 'Uploader' buttons, breadcrumb navigation, grid/list view toggle, search input

ai_assistant_page_ui.details: AI Assistant page shows Context-Aware badge, Actions ON/OFF toggle, Chat/Générer mode toggle, GPT-4o model selector, 4 context-aware suggestion buttons, CRM data access info message

folder_creation_ui.details: Creating folder via UI works - modal opens, folder name input works, 'Créer' button creates folder, toast notification shows, folder appears in list

auth.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Returns token and user info

ai_enhanced.GET /api/ai-enhanced/status: PASS - Returns enabled, features.context_aware=true, daily_limit, remaining
ai_enhanced.GET /api/ai-enhanced/context: PASS - Returns CRM data summary (factures, contacts, tâches, pipeline, devis)
ai_enhanced.POST /api/ai-enhanced/execute-action (cr: PASS - Creates task, returns success=true, task_id, message
PASS - Creates quote, returns success=true, quote_id, quote_number, total

documents_page.folder_creation_flow: PASS - Modal opens, input works, folder created, toast shown

ai_assistant_page.page_load: PASS - AI Assistant page loads at /admin/assistant
ai_assistant_page.crm_info_message: PASS - 'J'ai accès à vos données CRM...' message visible
